tagline: When you look for a swimming pool cleaning and maintenance company, you want the best.

hero.headline:
34 Years Keeping Pools Pristine
in Fairfield County
hero.subheadline: You bought a pool to relax, not to spend every weekend testing chemicals and scrubbing tile. Putnam Swimming Pool Service has kept Fairfield and Westchester County pools crystal clear since 1992 — so you can just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Inground Pool Care<br class="hidden md:block"> From One Trusted Team
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to full renovations, our certified technicians handle every aspect of your concrete and gunite pool — so you never have to call anyone else.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, vacuuming, brushing, and water chemistry balancing every week. Your pool stays swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair
cards.description: Pumps, filters, heaters, and salt systems diagnosed and repaired by certified technicians. Most issues resolved in a single visit.

cards.title: Pool Renovation
cards.description: Coping, tile replacement, plaster resurfacing, and structural restoration. We bring aging pools back to their original beauty.

cards.title: Equipment Installation
cards.description: Professional installation of filters, pumps, heaters, and sanitization systems — properly sized and configured for your pool.

cards.title: Seasonal Opening & Closing
cards.description: Expert spring startup and winter closing services that protect your pool through harsh Connecticut winters and get you swimming sooner.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical balancing that keeps water safe, sparkling, and gentle on skin. No guesswork — just science-backed pool care.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool Season

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Evaluation
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will visit your property for an honest, no-pressure assessment. We serve all of Fairfield and Westchester County.

steps.title: Our Certified Team Gets to Work
steps.description: Licensed, long-tenured technicians arrive on schedule with everything needed. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment — we handle it all so you do not have to.

steps.title: Enjoy Your Pool All Season
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear from opening day to closing. If you are ever not completely satisfied, we come back and make it right — that is the Putnam promise.

about.label: Why Fairfield County Trusts Us
about.headline: Family-Owned Since 1992 — Three Decades of Pool Expertise
about.description: Founded by Jeff Saunders in 1992, Putnam Swimming Pool Service is a family-owned company built on doing things right. Our team of long-tenured professionals collectively holds over 166 years of combined experience, and most of our technicians have been with us for 7 to 25+ years. We specialize exclusively in inground concrete and gunite pools, which means every technician is a true specialist — not a generalist learning on your pool.

features.title: Fully Licensed in CT & NY
features.description: We hold pool builder, plumbing, and home improvement licenses in both Connecticut and New York — full legal compliance on every job.

features.title: BBB A+ Accredited Since 2013
features.description: Our Better Business Bureau accreditation with an A+ rating reflects our commitment to honest practices and customer satisfaction.

features.title: Long-Tenured Expert Team
features.description: Our technicians average over a decade with the company. You get experienced professionals who know your pool, not rotating strangers.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Get an honest quote tailored to your pool. We believe in transparency — no hidden fees, no upsells, just fair pricing for expert service.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. With 34 years in business and an A+ BBB rating, our reputation depends on your satisfaction — and we take that seriously.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in Fairfield and Westchester County are scheduled within one week. For urgent needs like equipment failures or green pool emergencies, we offer priority response. Call us and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: Do you only service inground concrete and gunite pools?
faqs.answer: Yes, we specialize exclusively in inground concrete and gunite swimming pools. This focus means our technicians are true specialists with deep expertise in the specific needs of concrete and gunite pool surfaces, plumbing, and equipment.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and certified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We hold pool builder, plumbing, and home improvement licenses in both Connecticut and New York. Our team includes NSPF-certified professionals, and we are proud members of the Association of Pool and Spa Professionals.

faqs.question: Do you service pools in Westchester County, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are fully licensed in both Connecticut and New York and regularly service pools throughout lower Fairfield County, CT and Westchester County, NY — including Greenwich, Stamford, Darien, Rye, and White Plains.

faqs.question: What makes Putnam different from other pool companies?
faqs.answer: Three things set us apart: 34 years of family-owned dedication, a team with over 166 years of combined experience where most technicians have been with us 7 to 25+ years, and our exclusive focus on inground concrete and gunite pools. We are specialists, not generalists.

testimonials.name: Henry
testimonials.text: Just a word of thanks to Putnam Swimming Pool Service for a really good summer swimming season. The pool was always clean and well-maintained throughout the entire season.

testimonials.name: Satisfied Customer
testimonials.text: You guys did a nice job closing up our pool. Professional, thorough, and on time. We will definitely be calling you again in the spring for opening.

testimonials.name: New Homeowner
testimonials.text: The Putnam team helped us open the pool at our new home that needed draining, power washing, and some repairs. Very responsive and great to work with from start to finish.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Stays Perfect All Season?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool evaluation from Fairfield County's most experienced pool team. 34 years of family-owned service — call today.
